title: UNIFIL Serbian peacekeeper Sgt. Milovan Jovanović killed by mortar fire near Marjayoun — 7th UNIFIL fatality since March 2
snippet: A Serbian UNIFIL peacekeeper, Sergeant Milovan Jovanović, was killed when mortar fire impacted UN position 7-2 near Marji'yun in Sector East of the UNIFIL area of operations on June 3-4. Two other peacekeepers were wounded. The IDF said Hezbollah fired from the Al-Qatrani area, while UNIFIL did not assign blame. He is the 7th UNIFIL peacekeeper killed since the March 2 escalation. The UN Secretary-General condemned the killing.
tag_reason: UNIFIL peacekeeper death announced June 4-5, not in previous day's index. New casualty event.
